attributes.action: Petition for the Abolition of Human Abortion in the United Kingdom
attributes.additional_details: Scripture declares that human life begins at conception & bears the image of God, worthy of protection, not destruction (Genesis 1:27; Psalm 139:13–16). Science affirms life begins at fertilization (5,502 biologists survey; College of Pediatricians; The Developing Human, Keith L. Moore). UK law, the Human Rights Act 1998, the ECHR, common law, & medical ethics have been violated by dehumanization & immoral legislation. No government, or majority has the right to dehumanize or take innocent life.
attributes.background:
1. Immediately & fully abolish abortion in the UK

2. End all public funding & international exportation of abortion services & ideology

3. Uphold the human right to life equally from fertilization to natural death

4. Establish equal justice under the law for murder of born & preborn humans

rejection.details: Ban and criminalise all abortions. Choose Adoption and Save Children’s Lives: https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/764767
